name: eduSkillsMP
description: The Edu Skills Marketplace for Claude — curated, verified skills for higher education institutions.
author: philkomarny

skills.name: prospect-outreach
skills.description: Generate personalized outreach to prospective students across recruitment funnel stages.

skills.name: application-reviewer
skills.description: Review and score student applications with holistic evaluation rubrics.

skills.name: yield-campaign-manager
skills.description: Design and execute multi-channel yield campaigns to convert admitted students into deposited students.

skills.name: transfer-articulation
skills.description: Evaluate course equivalencies, draft articulation agreements, and create transfer guides for incoming students.

skills.name: financial-aid-communicator
skills.description: Draft financial aid award letters, FAFSA guidance, and scholarship notifications that help families understand their aid packages.

skills.name: campus-visit-coordinator
skills.description: Plan campus visit programs, create visit day schedules, and design outreach for prospective students and families.

skills.name: enrollment-forecast
skills.description: Build enrollment projection models, analyze demographic trends, and create enrollment reports for institutional planning.

skills.name: admitted-student-onboarding
skills.description: Create onboarding communications and task sequences for newly admitted students from deposit through first day of classes.

skills.name: international-recruitment
skills.description: Draft recruitment materials for international student markets, create country-specific outreach, and assist with I-20/visa communications.

skills.name: waitlist-strategy
skills.description: Manage waitlist communications, create conversion strategies, and draft status update templates for waitlisted applicants.

skills.name: enrollment-campaign
skills.description: Analyze enrollment marketing campaign performance and optimize recruitment spend.

skills.name: content-brief
skills.description: Create content briefs for program pages, recruitment materials, and institutional content.

skills.name: brand-voice-guide
skills.description: Define and document institutional brand voice, tone guidelines, and messaging frameworks.

skills.name: social-media-calendar
skills.description: Plan and create social media content calendars for higher education institutions.

skills.name: crisis-communications
skills.description: Draft crisis communication plans, holding statements, and stakeholder messaging for campus emergencies.

skills.name: alumni-storyteller
skills.description: Craft compelling alumni success stories, donor spotlights, and impact narratives for advancement marketing.

skills.name: program-page-optimizer
skills.description: Optimize academic program web pages for SEO and conversion with better headlines, CTAs, and structure.

skills.name: email-newsletter-creator
skills.description: Design and write email newsletters for university audiences including prospects, students, alumni, and donors.

skills.name: event-promotion
skills.description: Create promotional plans and content for campus events including open houses, commencement, and galas.

skills.name: media-relations
skills.description: Draft press releases, media pitches, talking points, and interview prep for institutional news.

skills.name: curriculum-designer
skills.description: Design and map course curricula with learning outcomes, assessments, and competency alignment.

skills.name: accreditation-writer
skills.description: Write self-study reports, compliance narratives, and accreditation documentation.

skills.name: learning-outcome-mapper
skills.description: Map course and program learning outcomes to institutional goals, accreditation standards, and competency frameworks.

skills.name: program-review-writer
skills.description: Write academic program review self-study reports including data analysis, SWOT assessments, and improvement plans.

skills.name: syllabus-builder
skills.description: Create complete course syllabi with learning outcomes, schedules, policies, assessments, and accessibility statements.

skills.name: faculty-evaluation-rubric
skills.description: Design evaluation rubrics for faculty teaching, scholarship, and service for tenure review and peer observation.

skills.name: assessment-plan-designer
skills.description: Create assessment plans for courses and programs with direct and indirect measures, rubrics, and closing-the-loop documentation.

skills.name: new-program-proposal
skills.description: Draft new academic program proposals including needs assessment, market analysis, curriculum outline, and financial projections.

skills.name: articulation-agreement
skills.description: Draft articulation agreements between institutions including course equivalency tables, transfer pathways, and dual enrollment frameworks.

skills.name: academic-catalog-editor
skills.description: Write and edit academic catalog entries including program descriptions, admission requirements, degree plans, and course descriptions.

skills.name: early-alert-responder
skills.description: Triage student early alerts, draft intervention plans, and generate retention reports.

skills.name: academic-advisor-notes
skills.description: Write professional advising session notes, action plans, and follow-up communications.

skills.name: retention-risk-analyzer
skills.description: Analyze student risk indicators, generate retention reports, and draft intervention recommendations.

skills.name: career-readiness-coach
skills.description: Create resume reviews, cover letter feedback, interview prep, and career exploration resources.

skills.name: degree-audit-assistant
skills.description: Review degree audits, identify remaining requirements, plan course sequences, and draft academic plans.

skills.name: tutoring-session-planner
skills.description: Design tutoring and supplemental instruction sessions, create study guides, and draft learning support materials.

skills.name: student-conduct-writer
skills.description: Draft student conduct letters, hearing summaries, and sanction communications.

skills.name: first-year-experience
skills.description: Design first-year experience programming including orientation, FYE courses, and peer mentor training.

skills.name: disability-accommodation
skills.description: Draft accommodation letters, accessible syllabus language, and accommodation plan documentation.

skills.name: mentorship-program-designer
skills.description: Design peer and faculty mentoring programs with matching criteria, training, and assessment frameworks.

skills.name: grant-proposal-writer
skills.description: Write grant proposals, budgets, and compliance narratives for federal and private funding.

skills.name: budget-narrative-builder
skills.description: Write budget justification narratives for grants and institutional budgets, connecting line items to project objectives.

skills.name: nsf-proposal-formatter
skills.description: Format and structure NSF grant proposals following current GPG guidelines and directorate requirements.

skills.name: nih-biosketch-writer
skills.description: Create and format NIH biosketches following the current SciENcv format with all required sections.

skills.name: subcontract-agreement
skills.description: Draft subcontract and subaward agreements for sponsored research including scope, budget, and compliance.

skills.name: effort-reporting-guide
skills.description: Help faculty and staff understand and complete effort reporting for federally sponsored projects.

skills.name: cost-share-calculator
skills.description: Calculate and document cost-sharing commitments for grant proposals including in-kind and matching funds.

skills.name: annual-financial-report
skills.description: Create annual financial reports for academic departments with variance analysis and narrative explanations.

skills.name: endowment-stewardship
skills.description: Write endowment stewardship reports for donors with fund performance, impact stories, and usage summaries.

skills.name: audit-response-writer
skills.description: Draft responses to internal and external audit findings with corrective action plans and evidence.

skills.name: irb-protocol-writer
skills.description: Draft IRB protocols for human subjects research including study descriptions, consent forms, and risk assessments.

skills.name: literature-review-assistant
skills.description: Help researchers structure and write literature reviews with systematic search strategies and synthesis frameworks.

skills.name: survey-instrument-designer
skills.description: Design survey instruments for institutional research with question design, response scales, and validity frameworks.

skills.name: data-visualization-narrator
skills.description: Create narrative descriptions and interpretations of data visualizations for institutional reports and presentations.

skills.name: institutional-research-report
skills.description: Write institutional research reports including enrollment trends, retention analysis, and peer comparison studies.

skills.name: research-poster-creator
skills.description: Design academic research poster content with structured sections and visual hierarchy for conference presentations.

skills.name: statistical-analysis-guide
skills.description: Guide researchers through statistical test selection, assumption checking, and APA-format reporting.

skills.name: faculty-research-profile
skills.description: Write faculty research profiles, bio sketches, and expertise summaries for websites and grant applications.

skills.name: data-governance-policy
skills.description: Draft data governance policies, data dictionaries, and classification frameworks for institutional data management.

skills.name: peer-review-responder
skills.description: Help researchers draft point-by-point responses to peer reviewer comments for journal manuscript revisions.

skills.name: sacscoc-self-study
skills.description: Write SACSCOC self-study narratives, compliance certifications, and QEP documents.

skills.name: ferpa-compliance-checker
skills.description: Review communications, policies, and data practices for FERPA compliance and draft compliant language.

skills.name: title-ix-report-writer
skills.description: Draft Title IX annual reports, climate survey summaries, training documentation, and policy communications.

skills.name: clery-act-reporter
skills.description: Draft Clery Act annual security reports, crime log entries, timely warnings, and emergency notifications.

skills.name: state-authorization-tracker
skills.description: Track state authorization requirements for distance education and draft compliance documentation.

skills.name: policy-manual-drafter
skills.description: Write institutional policy documents with proper structure, approval workflows, and revision history.

skills.name: ada-compliance-reviewer
skills.description: Review campus facilities, digital content, and programs for ADA/Section 504 compliance and draft remediation plans.

skills.name: board-report-writer
skills.description: Write reports and presentations for boards of trustees and regents with dashboards and executive summaries.

skills.name: risk-assessment-matrix
skills.description: Create institutional risk assessment matrices, risk registers, and mitigation plans for enterprise risk management.

skills.name: student-complaint-handler
skills.description: Draft student complaint response letters, track resolution processes, and create complaint trend reports.

skills.name: helpdesk-ticket-responder
skills.description: Draft professional helpdesk ticket responses, knowledge base articles, and escalation communications for campus IT support.

skills.name: sis-integration-guide
skills.description: Document SIS integration specifications, data mapping guides, and API documentation for Banner, Colleague, or PeopleSoft.

skills.name: lms-course-builder
skills.description: Create LMS course templates, module structures, and setup guides for Canvas, Blackboard, or Moodle course development.

skills.name: campus-network-troubleshooter
skills.description: Create network troubleshooting guides, outage communication templates, and network documentation for campus IT infrastructure.

skills.name: it-security-policy
skills.description: Draft IT security policies, acceptable use policies, incident response plans, and data classification guidelines for higher education.

skills.name: data-migration-planner
skills.description: Plan and document data migration projects including mapping specifications, validation checklists, and rollback procedures.

skills.name: vendor-rfp-writer
skills.description: Write RFP documents for technology procurement including requirements specifications, evaluation criteria, and vendor comparison matrices.

skills.name: business-continuity-plan
skills.description: Draft IT business continuity and disaster recovery plans including BIA, recovery procedures, and testing schedules.

skills.name: change-management-template
skills.description: Create change management documentation including change requests, impact assessments, communication plans, and rollback procedures.

skills.name: user-training-guide
skills.description: Create end-user training guides, quick reference cards, and onboarding documentation for campus technology systems.
